usage: reportMultibit [-help] [-bit <bit>] [-outFile <file name>] [-type {comb latch flop seq iso ls}] [-cell <cell name> | -library  | -reasonNotMerged <unmerged reason> | -notMergedSummary  | -equiv ] [-hinst <hinst> | -library  | -cell <cell name> | -equiv ]

options.name: -cell
options.description: Reports the cell details and equivalence information of a single lib-cell

options.name: -equiv
options.description: Reports equivalnce summary of lib-cells of selected type

options.name: -hinst
options.description: Hinst on which reporting is to be done

options.name: -notMergedSummary
options.description: Reports summary of not merged instances

options.name: -reasonNotMerged
options.description: {All Area BankLabelPartition BankLabelRegister Bus CellEquivalent ClockPinDangling Connection Constraint ControlTerm DRV Distance Legalization Location MisMatch Partition Power SafetyPartition SafetySerCell ScanConnection SePinDangling Timing Unknown UnmatchedPins User} Reports the instances that could not be merged for specified reason

options.name: -type
options.description: Reports for the given type of cells
